name: loan-amount-docs-only-broker-silent
rationale: Broker intake email mentions submission but does NOT state loan_amount in body. loan_application doc contains loan_amount $340,000. No correction. F1.LA canonical-map must fall back to docs-only source tier (loan_application). Tests behavior when both broker_correction + broker_initial_intent tiers are empty for the field; doc source is the only signal.
notes: Single-event sequence. TT=P (purchase, not refi) varies the transaction type axis incidentally. Broker email is intentionally vague on loan_amount — name + property + 'submission' but no $ figure.
